notes: Two-panel layout faithfully echoes the input photo's dorsal-over-lateral pose, but interior linework is scribbly/broken and clutters the otherwise plate-like silhouette.
specific_issues: interior body filled with dashed/broken scribble fragments rather than clean ink contour
mantle and arm outlines are not single continuous strokes — visible breaks and double lines
fin shape on top view is squared off and lacks the smooth rhomboidal sweep of the photo
stipple is present but mixed with noisy short dashes that read as photo-trace clutter
sucker rings on arms are scattered and uneven rather than sequential along each arm
eye on lateral view is small and acceptable, but eye absent/incorrect on dorsal view (photo shows two dark spots in dorsal view that aren't replicated cleanly)
tentacular club tips look truncated/forked rather than the expanded paddle shown in the photo
